zh.lifeSummary: 當Pierre II De Valois De France於1340年出生在法國諾門迪奧內阿根坦時，他的父親Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon43歲，母親María de la Cerda30歲。他於1371年10月10日與Marie Chamaillard在法國巴-諾門迪奧內阿根坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年9月20日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pierre II De Valois De France于1340年出生在法国諾門迪奧內阿根坦时，他的父亲Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon43岁，母亲María de la Cerda30岁。他于1371年10月10日与Marie Chamaillard在法国巴-諾門迪奧內阿根坦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1404年9月20日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: France
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from France (see 2 below).

French: habitational name given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris); or, in southern France, an ethnic name for someone from what is now the northern half of the country, where the langue d'oïl (Old French as distinct from Occitan) was spoken. Compare   Defrance   and   Lafrance  .
Czech (Franče): from a pet form of František, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Defrance
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Henri, Jean-Paul.

French (mainly northern): habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, given to someone from France (at the time when the name only applied to those lands belonging to the French king, covering only a small part of its current territory) or from Île-de-France (i.e. from a region centered on Paris). Compare France .

nameMeanings.name: Pierre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pierre II De Valois De France was born in 1340, in Argentan, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon, was 43 and his mother, María de la Cerda, was 30. He married Marie Chamaillard on 10 October 1371, in Argentan, Orne, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 20 September 1404, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pierre II De Valois De France est né en 1340, à Argentan, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon, avait 43 ans et sa mère, María de la Cerda, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Marie Chamaillard le 10 octobre 1371, à Argentan, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1404, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pierre II De Valois De France 1340 in Argentan, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon 43 und seine Mutter María de la Cerda 30. Er hat am 10. Oktober 1371 in Argentan, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Marie Chamaillard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 20. September 1404 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre II De Valois De France è nato il nel 1340 nel Argentan, Orne, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, María de la Cerda, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Marie Chamaillard il 10 ottobre 1371, nel Argentan, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 settembre 1404, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Pierre II De Valois De Franceが1340年にフランスノーマンディオルンアルジェンタンで生まれた時，父Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alenconは43歳，母María de la Cerdaは30歳であった。1371年10月10日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンアルジェンタンでMarie Chamaillardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1404年9月20日に故郷で64歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pierre II De Valois De France(이)가 1340년 프랑스 노먼디 른 아전탠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 María de la Cerda(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1371년 10월 10일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 아전탠에서 Marie Chamaillard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 9월 20일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pierre II De Valois De France nasceu em 1340, em Argentan, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, María de la Cerda, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie Chamaillard em 10 de outubro de 1371, em Argentan, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1404, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pierre II De Valois De France родился в 1340 г. в местности арджентань, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon было 43 года, а матери, которую звали María de la Cerda, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie Chamaillard 10 октября 1371 г. в местности арджентань, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 20 сентября 1404 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pierre II De Valois De France nació en 1340, en Argentan, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Comte Charles II de Valois le Magnanime, comte d'Alencon, tenía 43 años y su mamá, María de la Cerda, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Marie Chamaillard el 10 de octubre de 1371, en Argentan, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1404, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Basse-Normandie, Francia.
